action.reasoning: Observation: Data exploration confirmed environment structure - 250x250 belief maps, nodes with utility/coords/visited/neighbors, 6000 training maps across room/tunnel/outdoor. Analysis: Need to build an exploration planner. Starting with a cost-aware utility heuristic (utility/distance scoring with BFS pathfinding) as a strong baseline. This avoids training complexity while being effective. Decision: Implement heuristic planner + predict.py, test locally, then submit for baseline evaluation.
